name: deAIify
description: Intercepts LLM output and eliminates em-dashes via regex-first rewrite with optional LLM fallback

mode.description: Rewrite strategy: 'auto' (regex-first, LLM fallback), 'regex' (deterministic only), 'llm' (always LLM)

correctionPrompt.default: The following text contains em-dashes or en-dashes. Rewrite it, replacing every em-dash and en-dash with " -- " (space-hyphen-hyphen-space). Do not change anything else. Do not restructure sentences. Do not add or remove words. Just swap the dashes.
correctionPrompt.description: Custom prompt for the embedded LLM rewrite (used in 'llm' and 'auto' fallback modes)

security-notes: Regex-first approach: LLM is only invoked when regex produces whitespace artifacts (mode=auto) or when explicitly configured (mode=llm)
LLM rewrite is verified before delivery: word count drift >10% or length expansion >50% triggers rejection (fail-open to original)
No user-supplied text reaches the LLM prompt - only the agent's own output is rewritten
privacy-notes: No disk persistence: sessions are ephemeral with no sessionFile written
No data leaves the OpenClaw runtime boundary - rewrite uses the platform's embedded agent
attack-surface-reduction: Deterministic regex mode available (mode=regex) for zero-LLM operation
LLM output verified against original before delivery
10s timeout on embedded agent prevents resource exhaustion
Fail-open design: plugin failure never blocks agent output
author: Shawn Petros
